name: copilot-cli-test
description: Demo GitHub Copilot CLI — version check + interactive suggest session using expect-style automation. NOTE: requires native Linux gh in WSL (not Windows gh.exe — Windows interop bypasses the PTY layer that expect uses). Pre-record installs gh via apt and the gh-copilot extension. Also requires gh auth login to have been run in WSL beforehand.

commands: command -v gh || sudo apt-get install -y gh
gh auth status || { echo 'ERROR: gh not authenticated. Run: gh auth login'; exit 1; }
gh extension list 2>/dev/null | grep -q copilot || gh extension install github/gh-copilot

steps.send: write a bash for loop that counts from 1 to 5
